resources.string: is a premium feature, please buy the paid version to support the developers!

We are migrating to only one Domoticz Android app.

This version can still be used with all the premium features, but wil not receive any updates anymore in the future.

You can export and import your settings via the settings menu.
Are you sure?? This also clears all homescreen widget settings, so you should re-add them afterwards..
You can\'t remove the last server in the list.
Dil ayarlarının etkin olması için yeniden başlatma gereklidir.
Set a specific timer for the auto refresh in seconds.
IMPORTANT: Please check if your Domoticz system uses Login Page as the authentication method. Basic Auth is going to be removed from Domoticz from next update!
Setup automation rules with Tasker for Domoticz
Setup automation rules within Tasker for Domoticz!
This app collects location data to enable for geofencing services within this app, even when the app is closed or not in use.
Beacons are not supported on this device
Give this beacon a proper name.
Check the list of paired beacon devices.
Bluetooth needs to be turned on in your device settings.
Beacon automation disabled, please setup via settings.
For a Beacon device to automate something in Domoticz, a switch should be linked to an beacon.
Enable notifications for entering and leaving a beacon region.
Bluetooth is not supported on this device
Give this bluetooth device a proper name.
Check the list of paired bluetooth devices.
Bluetooth needs to be turned on in your device settings.
Saved a new bluetooth device connection.
Show notifications when you connect or disconnect a bluetooth device.
Bluetooth automation disabled, please setup via settings.
For a bluetooth device to automate something in Domoticz, a switch should be linked to an bluetooth
Hata: herhangi bir ağa bağlı değil
Bütün anahtarları al, lütfen tekrar deneyin için
Geçerli bir enlem ve boylam değil
Geofencing üzerinde değişiklikler nedeniyle, lütfen yerlerinizi yeniden oluşturun
GeoFencing\'in etkili olması için bir anahtar GeoFence\'e bağlanmalıdır.
Geofencing disabled since no geofences are enabled
Uygulama çok fazla coğrafi alanı kaydetti
Bu NFC uygun bir isim ver.
NFC\'nin etkili olması için, bir anahtar NFC Etiketine bağlanmalıdır
Please choose a system to send the notification to
Could not send the notification to Domoticz
These storage permissions are needed for saving cache file, settings and save snapshots from the camera.
These location permissions are needed for Geofencing and to get the Wifi SSID\'s around you!
These phone state permissions are needed for enabling notifications!
These camera permissions are needed for scanning QR Codes!
These audio permissions are needed for Voice Recognition!
These fingerprint permissions are needed for enabling Fingerprint Security!
Bu QR Code uygun bir isim ver.
Yeni QR kodu tespit, lütfen ayarlar ile kurulum yapın
QR Kod devre dışı, lütfen ayarlar ile kurulum yapın
QR Code Scan\'ın etkili olması için, bir anahtar bir QR Koduna bağlı olmalıdır
Düşük cihaz depolaması nedeniyle QR Code bağımlılıkları indirilemiyor
Bu uygulama kamera iznine sahip olmadığından çalışmıyor. Uygulamadan şimdi çıkacaktır.
You do not have the rights for this action!
Yanlış şifre girildiğinde, domoticz hesap şifresi parmak izinin yerine oturması!
We need to make sure its you
Touch your finger on the fingerprint sensor to authorise your account.
Sort devices like sorted on the server
Custom sorting, drag and drop devices to sort them
Lock the current custom sorting (disable drag/drop)
Kontrol paneli üzerinde ekstra veri göster
Kontrol paneli üzerinde ekstra verileri gizle
Refresh the device state every couple of seconds
Don\'t refresh the device state every couple of seconds
Açık / kapalı düğmeleri olan anahtarları göster
Show a clock on the dashboard
Show the plans on the dashboard
Load the camera for connected switches
Android Wear cihazınızda hangi anahtarları görmek istediğinizi seçin
Android Wear özel öğeleri devredışı bırak
Android otomatik bildirimleri devre dışı bırak
Ayarlar alındı, lütfen Domoticz\'i yeniden başlatın.
Ayarlar verildi, lütfen Domoticz\'i yeniden başlatın.
You can help make our translations better, and even add new languages to this app via our Crowdin project
Setup fingerprints via Android Settings screens
Fingerprint Security is not supported on this device
First configure/connect a Fingerprint to this device
Are you sure? The failover password is the password of your Domoticz account.
Enable or Disable Widget on this device
Widgets are not enabled on this device, please check your settings of Domoticz
Please use widgets on your own risk!! Widgets are currently in Beta stage and probably contain certain bugs. It can cause large data / battery usage...
Push your registration id to Domoticz
Your registration id is now saved in Domoticz
Could not save your registration id in Domoticz, please try again later.
Overwrite previous notifications on this device
Vibrate when an notification is received
Bu aygıt üzerindeki belirli bildirimleri seçin
Belirli bildirimleri için bir Alarm sesi
Max değeri Min değerinden yüksek olmalıdır
Max değeri Min değerinden yüksek olmalıdır
Domoticz Android için çeşitli açık kaynak kütüphaneleri ile mümkün olmaktadır
Çekmece içerisinde en az bir öğeye ihtiyacınız var.
Domoticz sistem güncellemelerini kontrol etmemizi ister misin?
Sunucunuz güncellenirken bu uygulama düzgün çalışmayabilir.
Sunucunuzun güncellemeye hazır olup olmadığını kontrol ederken lütfen bekleyin
Bilinmeyen bir hata nedeniyle güncelleştirme başlatılamadı
Speech is not supported on this device
Give this Speech Command a proper name.
Speech Command disabled, please setup via settings.
For Speech Command to have effect, a switch should be linked
Could not find any logs to show
Could not get log data for

Domoticz is a Home Automation System that lets you monitor and configure various devices like: Lights, Switches, various sensors/meters like Temperature, Rain, Wind, UV, Electra, Gas, Water and much more. Notifications/Alerts can be sent to any mobile device.
Swipe to the right or use the navigation buttons at the bottom to continue
The next page is for your Domoticz settings.

You can specify a local and a remote server setting. The local settings are for when you are connected to your home wifi network. Remote settings are used when not connected to your home wifi network or when connected to cellular data (2G, 3G, 4G etc).
URL should not start with http
Please correct the data on the previous page
Use different address for local connection
Only used for non-standard Domoticz servers
Local directory (leave empty if not used)
Local username (leave empty if not used)
Local password (leave empty if not used)
No security panel found under your switches
Wifi is not supported on this device
Give this access point a proper name.
Check the list of paired access point.
This access point already configured on Domoticz.
Wifi needs to be turned on in your device settings.
Saved a new access point connection.
Wifi automation disabled, please setup via settings.
For an access point to automate something in Domoticz, a switch should be linked to an access point.
Show notifications when you connect or disconnect a wifi access point.
Connected to one of the registed access points.
Disconnected to one of the registed access points.
Domoticz is a very light weight home automation system that lets you monitor and configure various devices.
You can add devices to the Dashboard by saving them as favorites. Long click an item to save them as favorite!
You can set your startup screen in the settings!
You can now receive Notifications on your Android device! Change the way how notifications behave in the settings
You can configure multiple Domoticz servers in the settings.
You can set your startup screen in the settings!
You can specify which switches you would like to control from your Android wear device!
Receive the Domoticz notifications right on your Android Auto device!
You can see the history graph of an Utility, Weather or Temperature!
You can filter devices per status (on/off). Check the right upper menu icon for filtering!
You can put some widgets on your home screen!
You can now remove this Wizard from the navigation menu!
You are able to toggle switches via NFC!
You are able to toggle switches via Bluetooth connections!
Toggle switches by scanning a QR Code (or barcode)!
Toggle switches with your voice! Configure speech commands via the settings screens and connect switches.
Toggle switches by scanning for beacons!
